overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} \left[ \mathbf {I} - \frac {1}{2} \Delta t \mathbf {A} (t) \right] \mathbf {x} (t) = \left[ \mathbf {I} + \frac {1}{2} \Delta t \mathbf {A} (t - \Delta t) \right] \mathbf {x} (t - \Delta t) + \frac {1}{2} \Delta t \left[ \mathbf {b} (t - \Delta t) g (t - \Delta t) + \mathbf {b} (t) g (t) \right] \end{array} \tag {4}\tag{4-9}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} \left[ \mathbf {I} - \frac {1}{2} \Delta t \mathbf {A} (t) \right] \mathbf {x} (t) = \left[ \mathbf {I} + \frac {1}{2} \Delta t \mathbf {A} (t - \Delta t) \right] \mathbf {x} (t - \Delta t) + \frac {1}{2} \Delta t \left[ \mathbf {b} (t - \Delta t) g (t - \Delta t) + \mathbf {b} (t) g (t) \right] \end{array} \tag{4-9}
